title: Alpinestars SMX-5R Carbon Fiber Helmet

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Alpinestars SMX-5R utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system engineered to provide progressive energy absorption across varying impact vectors. The outer shell is constructed from a high-modulus carbon fiber composite, offering an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio that significantly reduces rotational forces during oblique impacts compared to traditional fiberglass constructions. Internal comfort is managed through a moisture-wicking, removable washable liner with integrated cheek pads designed to minimize pressure points while maintaining a secure fit.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of track performance with the Alpinestars SMX-5R, a helmet meticulously crafted for riders who demand uncompromising safety and aerodynamic efficiency. Featuring an all-carbon fiber shell, this lightweight powerhouse delivers superior impact protection without sacrificing the agility needed on the circuit. Its aggressive styling is matched by advanced ventilation channels that ensure optimal airflow, keeping you cool even during the most intense riding sessions.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Alpinestars SMX-5R Carbon Fiber helmet: ECE 22.06 certified, ultra-lightweight at 1380g, and designed for maximum aerodynamics on the track.
